_comment_block: Living Program block scheduling. block_start is the Monday Week 1 begins. The block is 4 weeks of progressive overload, then re-planned ~22nd monthly.
_comment_notify: Home Assistant push to iPhone. The hub tries ha_url (remote / Nabu Casa, works off-LAN) first, then ha_url_local. Token is read from ha_token_file at runtime (shared with the energy proxy) unless ha_token is set inline. notify_service is your companion-app service — CONFIRM this name in HA (Developer Tools > Services, filter 'notify').
_comment_anthropic: The Anthropic API key is read from the ANTHROPIC_API_KEY environment variable server-side (never stored here). Coaching is proxied through the hub so the key never reaches the browser.
_comment_health: Source labels Health Auto Export / Apple Health may report for each metric. Used to tag whether a reading came from the Oura ring or elsewhere.
_comment_workouts: Workouts arrive from the iPhone via the HA webhook → /ingest. iCloud scan is off so HA is the single inbound path.
_comment_notion: Notion page IDs (not secrets). The notion_token + anthropic_api_key live in the add-on Configuration tab, injected as env vars by run.sh — never committed to the repo.
_comment_food: Food is logged directly in the app (POST /food/entry). standard_meals_note is an optional Apple Note of named meals used as a parsing reference. Daily macro targets: high-protein, lower-carb.
_comment_weight: Target body weight (kg) for the Weight tab plan + feedback.
